  Source-backed arXiv sample
  #v(1em)
])

= Figure Captions

#figure(
  rect(width: 78%, height: 1.15in, stroke: 0.5pt),
  caption: [Dual diagram for the double poles in $S_"an"$],

#figure(
  rect(width: 78%, height: 1.15in, stroke: 0.5pt),
  caption: [The classical masses, 3-point couplings, and S-matrices of the nonsimply-laced affine Toda theories.],

#figure(
  rect(width: 78%, height: 1.15in, stroke: 0.5pt),
  caption: [Dual diagrams for anomalous threshold poles in $S_"ab"$],

Figures @fig:source-1 through @fig:source-3 preserve source-backed captions while replacing external graphics with deterministic placeholders.
